items.subjective_preview: Patient presents for combined diabetes and thyroid follow-up. Reports blood sugars running in the high 200s despite taking metformin 500mg daily. Taki...
items.objective_preview: Vitals: BP 132/80 mmHg, HR 76 bpm, Temp 98.4F, Wt 192 lbs, BMI 29.1. Neck: Thyroid non-tender, right lobe nodule palpable approximately 1 cm, no cervi...
items.assessment:
1. Type 2 diabetes mellitus with hyperglycemia - not at goal on metformin monotherapy
2. Thyroid nodule, right lobe - stable on exam, TI-RADS 3 on prior imaging
items.plan:
1. Order thyroid ultrasound for interval follow-up of right thyroid nodule
2. Consider adding second oral agent (sulfonylurea or SGLT2 inhibitor) or insulin given A1c 7.2% and fasting glucose >200
3. Increase metformin to 500mg BID as initial step
4. Recheck A1c in 3 months
5. Continue levothyroxine 50mcg daily
6. Diabetes education referral for carbohydrate counting and self-monitoring
